meta.phase-name: Staff admin, users, customers, and provider sync

intent.item: Expose first-party staff and customer administration in the ops app instead of outsourcing operational truth to provider dashboards.
Keep the admin IA compact: users, customers, and staff filters instead of three disconnected management systems.
Preserve a provider-adapter boundary so Clerk remains replaceable.

tasks.task: Build `/ops/users` with searchable user rows, staff filters, invite actions, membership summaries, and role-template assignment.
Build `/ops/customers` with first-party account and customer views that do not assume Clerk or Stripe are the source of truth.
Add entitlement lock/unlock controls, sync status metadata, and manual resync affordances for staff admins.
Implement inbound Clerk webhook reconciliation plus outbound first-party domain events for users, organizations, and memberships.
Keep provider-specific fields behind an adapter layer so identity or billing providers can change without rewriting app authorization.
